zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stapleton於大約1336年出生在英國波藍德艾登哈爾時，她的父親Nicholas Stapleton57歲，母親Isabella Richmond53歲。她於1361年10月16日與William Vavasour II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1404年11月8日之後在英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.Hazlewood, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾哈茲列武德
zh-hans.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stapleton于大约1336年出生在英国波藍德艾登哈爾时，她的父亲Nicholas Stapleton57岁，母亲Isabella Richmond53岁。她于1361年10月16日与William Vavasour II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1404年11月8日之后在英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stapleton was born about 1336, in Edenhall, Cumberland, England, her father, Nicholas Stapleton, was 57 and her mother, Isabella Richmond, was 53. She married William Vavasour II on 16 October 1361. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 8 November 1404, in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stapleton est née environ 1336, à Edenhall, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Stapleton, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Isabella Richmond, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé William Vavasour II le 16 octobre 1361. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 8 novembre 1404, à Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stapleton um 1336 in Edenhall, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Stapleton 57 und ihre Mutter Isabella Richmond 53. Sie hat am 16. Oktober 1361 William Vavasour II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 8. November 1404 in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stapleton è nata il circa 1336 nel Edenhall, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Nicholas Stapleton, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Isabella Richmond, aveva 53 anni. Lei sposato William Vavasour II il 16 ottobre 1361. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 8 novembre 1404, nel Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stapletonが約1336年にイギリスクウンバーランドイーデンハルで生まれた時，父Nicholas Stapletonは57歳，母Isabella Richmondは53歳であった。1361年10月16日にWilliam Vavasour IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1404年11月8日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ビー タドカスターで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stapleton(이)가 대략 1336년 영국 쿠벌랜드 에데홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Stapleton(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Richmond(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 1361년 10월 16일 William Vavasour II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1404년 11월 8일 이후 영국 요르크실르 하즐루드 비 타드카스터에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stapleton nasceu aproximadamente 1336, em Edenhall, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Stapleton, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Richmond, tinha 53 anos. Ela casou-se com William Vavasour II em 16 de outubro de 1361. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 8 de novembro de 1404, em Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stapleton родилась около 1336 г. в местности эденолл, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Stapleton было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Richmond, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Vavasour II 16 октября 1361 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 8 ноябрь 1404 г. в местности хазльвуд би тадкастир, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

sm.about 1336–after 8 November 1404: e tusa o le 1336–ina ua ma'ea le 8 Novema 1404

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stapleton nació aproximadamente 1336, en Edenhall, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Stapleton, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Isabella Richmond, tenía 53 años. Se casó con William Vavasour II el 16 de octubre de 1361. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 8 de noviembre de 1404, en Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
